visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair sits at a cluttered office desk typing on a keyboard. A man in a black and white striped sweater enters from the left, gesturing aggressively and yelling at her while pointing at documents on her desk. The woman looks surprised and defensive, touching her chin. (2) The man turns toward an off-camera direction, still shouting and pointing. Large white and blue text overlays appear around him as he continues his dramatic gestures. The woman looks on with a slightly bewildered expression. (3) The scene shifts to a brighter hallway or showroom. The man and woman are standing together; the woman holds the documents and gestures toward the man as if asking a question. (4) The setting transitions to a bedroom with a white mattress on a light wood frame. The woman falls backward onto the mattress while the man stands next to it, gesturing excitedly toward the bed. (5) Close-up shots show the man placing a candelabra with lit candles and a glass of orange liquid on the mattress while jumping nearby to demonstrate stability. (6) The man demonstrates lifting the mattress with one hand and smoothing the fabric surface. He points to various features while the woman lies in different sleeping positions. (7) The man speaks directly to the camera, gesturing with his hands and holding up fingers to indicate numbers, while the woman is seen sleeping in the background. (8) The man wakes the woman up by pulling her arm, and she sits up looking startled as he points back toward the office direction.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 張塔克. (2) [Subtitle]: 你早上10點進來幹嘛. [Variety]: 你早上10點進來幹嘛. (3) [Subtitle]: 我這個腳本. (4) [Subtitle]: 人家客戶是兩個禮拜後才要. (5) [Subtitle]: 你今天就把它打完. [Variety]: 你做事情那麼負責任. (6) [Subtitle]: 懲罰你. [Variety]: 懲罰你. (7) [Subtitle]: 鴨鴨! 這個月多給他兩倍薪水. [Slogan]: 多給他兩倍薪水. (8) [Subtitle]: 我他媽就看你花不花的完. (9) [Subtitle]: 這禮拜不要給我上班. [Slogan]: 這禮拜不要上班. (10) [Subtitle]: 不要讓我看到你. (11) [Subtitle]: 所以請問一下 我們要睡什麼床才可以做這種夢呢. (12) [Subtitle]: 剛那段在做夢是不是. (13) [Subtitle]: 來 你 試試這款. (14) [Logo]: 日日居 ZEZE GOOD. [Subtitle]: 三眼制釋壓床墊. (20) [Subtitle]: 經過SGS 80000次壓縮測試認證. (21) [Subtitle]: 無彈簧的設計 怎麼睡都不怕塌陷. (22) [Subtitle]: 而且它非常輕喔 單手 就可以把這個床體抬起來. (23) [Subtitle]: 再搭配膠原蛋白布套使用. (24) [Variety]: 抗菌防蟎. (25) [Subtitle]: 抗菌防蟎之外 也會增加肌膚接觸面的舒適度. (26) [Subtitle]: 日日居還有這款 雙層舒眠床墊. (27) [Subtitle]: 你就疊在任何一張床墊上使用 睡起來質感提升. (28) [Subtitle]: 現在日日居還提供 10年保固 150天安心試睡服務. [Slogan]: 10年保固 150天安心試睡服務. (29) [Subtitle]: 現在購買床墊 享6期0利率 再打57折. [Slogan]: 現在購買床墊 享6期0利率 再打57折. (30) [Subtitle]: 好睡你看看 要關燈嗎 沒關係 沒關係. (31) [Logo]: 嘎哥優惠. (32) [Subtitle]: 還沒下班咧 回去上班啦. (33) [Subtitle]: 你回來再自己做夢啦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female actress acting as employee/sleeper.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male with brown hair wearing a black sweater with white vertical stripes and blue jeans. A female with long dark hair wearing a black sweatshirt with 'JOY MACHINE' text and white pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An office with computers and partitions; a clean bedroom setting with a white bed and neutral curtains; a showroom hallway with glass display cases.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced mechanical keyboard typing sounds accompanied by a loud, aggressive male voice yelling commands. A series of percussive impact sounds occur as the man slams papers. (2) Vocal intensity remains high but shifts to a comedic tone. Sudden 'whoosh' sound effects mark visual text transitions. (3) A brief moment of dry dialogue between a male and female voice with minimal background noise. (4) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic dance music begins with a strong, repetitive kick drum beat. The male voice shifts into a professional, energetic sales narration. (5) Heavy thudding and rhythmic impact sounds are heard as someone jumps on a mattress. These occur in time with the music's beat. (6) A sharp 'ding' sound effect highlights a specific product benefit mentioned in the narration. (7) Music continues at a steady volume while the male voice lists promotional offers with high enthusiasm. (8) A final loud shouting voice and the sound of someone being startled ends the sequence, followed by a quick fade out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Transition -> Evidence -> Promotion -> Loop
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote '日日居 ZEZE GOOD' mattresses by using a comedic skit about a 'dream boss' who rewards hard work with high pay and time off, transitioning into a technical demonstration of the mattress's features and limited-time discounts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly demonstrates the product features, mentions the brand name multiple times, and provides discount information and a call to action.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Social media style editing with high text density and high-energy narration, likely aimed at a young working demographic.
